title: scabiosa communis var. alpestris
intro: Scabiosa communis var. alpestris, also known as Alpine Pincushion, is a perennial plant species within the Scabiosa genus, characterized by its delicate purple flowers and velvety foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Pincushion include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Alpine Pincushion can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
